mapper.select: SELECT id, event_uuid, actor_user_id, actor_type, event_type, target_type, target_id, result, reason, metadata_json, created_at FROM audit_logs WHERE actor_user_id = #{actorUserId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_uuid, actor_user_id, actor_type, event_type, target_type, target_id, result, reason, metadata_json, created_at) VALUES (#{eventUuid}, #{actorUserId}, #{actorType}, #{eventType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{result}, #{reason}, #{metadataJson}, NOW())
